rulings.Case Title: KENNETH C. CHI ET AL VS. OUTSTANDING PROPERTY SOLUTIONS, LLC ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion Of David Poulsen And Tcgsf, Inc., Dba Keller Williams San Francisco For Determination Of Good Faith Settlement, Pursuant To Cal. Code Civ. P. ? 877.6
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for April 1, 2021 line 1. DEFENDANTS DAVID POULSEN and TCGSF, INC. DBA KELLER WILLIAMS SAN FRANCISCO's Notice Of Motion And Motion for Determination Of Good Faith Settlement is OFF CALENDAR. On March 23, 2021 this motion was continued for parties to file all the necessary documents showing that the bankruptcy stay has been lifted. As of March 30, 2021, no Notice of Termination (Mandatory form CM-181) on file. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303; or Phone Dial in: (415) 762-9988; Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Case Title: BLG CAPITAL LTD. ET AL VS. MICHAEL SHVO ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Specially Appearing Defendant Deutsche Finance Us Ventures Llcs Notice Of Motion And Joinder To Specially Appearing Defendants Michael Shvo, Shvo, Inc., Shvo Holdings Inc., Shvo Development Llc, Shvo Enterprises Llc, Shvo Capital Llc, Shvo Concepts,
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for April 1, 2021 line 5. Specially Appearing Defendant Deutsche Finance Us Ventures Llcs Notice Of Motion And Joinder To Specially Appearing Defendants Motion to Quash Service of Summons is GRANTED in part and hearing required in part. Motion is granted as to all claims arising out of the Big Red purchase. The Court is inclined to grant Plaintiff's request for discovery re: jurisdiction. By no later than 8:00 a.m. on April 1, 2021 Plaintiff to submit proposed discovery (e.g. Notice of Deposition; Special Interrogatories, etc). If request for continuance is granted, the motion regarding Transamerica claims will be heard on June 1, 2021; supplemental opposition will be due on May 19, 2021 and supplemental reply will be due on May 26, 2021. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303; or Phone Dial in: (415) 762-9988; Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified and the opposing party does not appear.
